title: Amethyl
description: Create powerful items and conquer the world under the protection of Amethyl...
body:
# Warning, kinda of a lag machine too big for me to fix,
# im sowwy



Create powerful items and conquer the world under the protection of Amethyl...

Amethyl adds a new material to the game called Amethyl. It is used to create various items in this datapack. 

[Showcase Video (Enable Captions)](https://youtu.be/3mJDXV_4cF4?si=Cfg68RhPqWCkqEwM)

Resource packed needed:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/player-s-universal-resourcepack/
- Requires Optifine or CITResewn(Fabric)

Join the discord for suggestions, bug reports, or just hangout!
https://discord.gg/dQHfrdhRcy

[Wiki](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16QxHag8DVOu3h1Wx_w_JmNjZYS59WMElsYncYa_fNFc/edit?usp=sharing)

Features:
- Powerful Weapons
- Special Mobs (Coming Soon)
- Custom Structures (Coming Soon)


Warning:
- During the crafting animation of the sword, the area will be covered with unstable particles, it will linger forever if the sword isn't picked up, after the sword is picked up the particles will linger for 5 minutes. Note, you will be immune to it when you have the sword. It is recommended to craft this in an open area, or just away from other living beings.
